UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 65 BUENA VISTA I4, LP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CONRAD, SHARON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 65 BUENA VISTA AVENUE E, UNIT 102, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94117 [COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO], LEASE FORFEITED, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 76635316)
